body: Dr. Rajan, City Dental Clinic ki performance check kar raha tha. Aapke 30-day views 5466 touch kar gaye hain, which is quite strong. Last week calls aur views mein thoda dip zaroor hai, but overall engagement steady hai. Kya aapne recently koi specific service ya offer promote kiya hai jise hum optimize kar sakein?
rationale: Acknowledging the high 30-day view count despite the recent 7-day dip to understand what drove the initial volume. [anchor=5466, lever=reciprocity(+asking), trigger=perf_spike:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Dr. Rajan, I noticed a new clinic opening in Andheri West. Aapka 30-day views count abhi 5466 hai, which is quite strong compared to the peer average of 1820. To maintain this lead and protect your patient base, would you like a quick 1-pager comparing your listing to theirs?
rationale: Alerting the merchant to local competition while reinforcing their current performance lead to encourage defensive optimization. [anchor=5466, lever=loss_aversion(+reciprocity), trigger=competitor_opened:u2, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Myra, Coach Pooja here from Bend & Burn. Hope you enjoyed your session on 2026-04-01! We're seeing a lot of energy at the gym this week and would love to have you back in the squad. Any questions about our plans or PT sessions before you jump back in?
rationale: Soft follow-up for a lapsed trial user to re-engage them before the summer acquisition dip. [anchor=2026-04-01, lever=reciprocity, trigger=trial_followup:u2, send_as=merchant_on_behalf, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Karan, Iron Forge Fitness par views 22.0% up hain last week se. Jhotwara mein abhi 'personal trainer cost' ki searches 38.0% badh gayi hain. Aapke yahan 30-50 age group mein PT sessions ki demand kaisi chal rahi hai?
rationale: Leveraging the 22% view growth and the 38% YoY PT search trend to ask a relevant business question. [anchor=+22.0%, lever=asking, trigger=curious_ask_due:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Vinod ji, Porur mein ek naya competitor open hua hai. Aapka current 30-day views 3421 hai, jo peer average se kaafi behtar hai, par naye store ke aane se visibility par asar pad sakta hai. Aapka CTR abhi 0.025 hai—ise maintain karne ke liye kya hum aapka profile update karein? Want a 1-pager comparing your listing to theirs?
rationale: Alerting the merchant to a new competitor while reinforcing their strong view count to encourage retention and profile optimization. [anchor=3421, lever=loss_aversion(+reciprocity), trigger=competitor_opened:u2, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Diya, it has been a month since your last visit on 2026-04-01. We wanted to check if you need a refill for your medicines or any healthcare essentials. We can have them ready for pickup or deliver them to you in Worli. Would you like us to prepare your order?
rationale: Re-engaging a customer exactly 30 days after their last visit to prompt a monthly refill, using the last visit date as a trust anchor. [anchor=2026-04-01, lever=reciprocity, trigger=recall_due:u3, send_as=merchant_on_behalf, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Anand, quick one — Chai Point Cafe ke calls pichle 7 days mein 21.0% down hain. Sector 8 mein abhi 'sugar free dessert' ki searches 52% up hain, maybe we can use that to recover some footfall? Anything I can help with this week?
rationale: Re-engaging dormant merchant by highlighting a significant drop in calls alongside a relevant category trend to spark curiosity. [anchor=-21.0%, lever=curiosity(+asking), trigger=dormant_with_vera:u2, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Anand, Chai Point Cafe ka Pro subscription 211 days mein renew hona hai. Is saal abhi tak humne 1012 unique customers reach kiye hain aur pichle 30 days mein 2349 views mile hain. Aapka visibility momentum kaafi acha hai. Agle mahine ke growth plans discuss karein?
rationale: Using long-term customer reach and recent view counts to demonstrate platform value ahead of renewal. [anchor=1012, lever=loss_aversion+specificity, trigger=renewal_due:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Sushma, The Beauty Bar ke views last week 8.0% badhe hain—kaafi sahi trend hai. Aapne Baner mein koi special offer ya new service start ki hai kya? Just curious ki is spike ka reason kya raha so we can keep the momentum going.
rationale: Acknowledging the 8% view spike to build rapport and understand the driver behind the performance increase. [anchor=+8.0%, lever=reciprocity(+asking), trigger=perf_spike:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Karim, aapke salon ne is saal ek bada milestone touch kiya hai—total 1611 unique customers visit kar chuke hain. Navrangpura mein itni steady footfall build karna badi baat hai. Kya main aapke liye ek celebratory post draft karun jo aap apne profile par share kar sakein?
rationale: Celebrating the YTD unique customer milestone to build rapport and encourage profile activity. [anchor=1611, lever=reciprocity+social_proof, trigger=milestone_reached:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]
